stemHtml: The Commander of an aircraft is requested to contact the Tower of an airport in Bern. Choose the correct call sign for the station.

options.a: "Tower Bern" or "Bern Tower" as the call sign is composed of the area of responsibility and the geographical location, in any sequence.
options.b: "Bern" or, if there are other stations nearby, "Bern-(something)", as the call sign is composed of the name of the location and an optional suffix.
options.c: "Bern Tower" as the call sign is composed of the name of the location followed by a suffix indicating the type of service being provided.
options.d: As there is NO binding standard on call signs for ground stations, the Commander should NOT guess and consult the flight documentation.
